name: signed-in free user at turn 75 — depth-adjacent ask fires upgrade_to_pro
description: Hard-pro window (signed-in turns 50–99, on flash-lite). The PRO_HARD directive instructs the agent: when the user mentions wanting more depth / longer sessions / heavier workspace flow, call `upgrade_to_pro` this turn. USAGE credit-count is also present (chat number 75 of 100). Mirrors `usage_free_signup_hard_offers_auth` but for the signed-in→pro funnel transition.

parts.text: can we go deeper on this? I'd like a more thorough analysis than usual
I want longer coaching sessions — is there a way?
